channel.title: Vim on Jiby's toolbox
channel.description: Recent content in Vim on Jiby's toolbox

item.title: Keyboard navigation Vimium in Firefox
item.description: Today I want to celebrate niche tooling that makes life more comfortable on the computer. For context, I like to work with computers from the keyboard, minimizing use of the mouse. But this is often difficult to do consistently, especially when everything is a web app, a world known to be mouse-focused. Let me tell you about the fantastic Firefox extensions Vimium, and Edit With Emacs, both of which make the keyboard life more pleasant.
